name: Default Audit
when_to_use: Bare invocation or request to find context/token waste, idle MCP servers, unused plugins/skills/commands/subagents, or pruneable items in active local stores

name: Scoped Audit
when_to_use: User asks to audit only specific kinds (e.g. just MCP servers or plugins), all history, a faster recent-only pass, or a non-default home

name: Act On Named Items
when_to_use: User names items to remove, disable, delete, or move into this repo after an audit

name: Move Named Skills
when_to_use: User names skill directories to move into this repo and remove from active stores after validation

name: Evaluate This Skill
when_to_use: Validate registry references, script behavior, default audit behavior, and act safety
